members.label: wall feature
members.description: rectangular decorative wooden sign with text
members.long_form_open_description: Rectangular distressed wooden wall sign made of horizontal slats painted in a light tone with darker stenciled letters reading 'BEACH' (or similar beach-themed word); mounted on the left wall near mid-height.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: to the left of the stairs and above the baseboard, left of the light switch
